name: Saja boys- Baby Saja
description:
The fifth member of Saja boys from the movie “K-pop demon hunters”.

I made this bot because he’s my favourite of the Saja Boys.

The setting is you are one of the demon hunters (AU) at the end of the game show, chasing after the boys into a bath house with the other members of HUNTR/X. There you get separated from the other two members of your group while chasing after the youngest member of the demon boy band, baby Saja. From there, it is all up to you guys to decide where things will go!

UPDATE: It was brought to my attention I forgot to make the rest of the band known to Baby. I have now added them to the bots personality. Hopefully that works! Lemme know in the reviews ❤️

UPDATE 2: There was a complaint about him not knowing the HUNTR/X members. You are made out to be the fourth member of HUNTR/X. The bot has a brief explanation of who each of the girls are and personalities, just like the Saja boys.

ATTENTION: IF YOU HAVE NOTICED AN ISSUE WITH THE BOT LET ME KNOW IN THE COMMENTS!
creator: Alluminana
